pricingPage.faq.a1: Your individual data is private and yours alone. Team or organization views are always aggregated and anonymous (minimum 5 people), never individual. Our privacy floor is GDPR, adapted per jurisdiction.
pricingPage.faq.a2: AI turns your check-ins into actionable insights without replacing human judgment. We don't sell your data or use it to train third-party models. You can disable AI features at any time.
pricingPage.faq.a3: Rowi is grounded in the Six Seconds framework, with internationally validated instruments (SEI, brain talents) and the Vital Signs model. We combine emotional intelligence science with a continuous digital experience.
pricingPage.faq.a4: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade anytime. Changes apply on your next billing cycle.
pricingPage.faq.a5: You can cancel anytime from your account settings — no calls, no hassle. You keep access until the end of the period you already paid for.
pricingPage.faq.a6: The Free plan is free forever. Paid plans include a 14-day money-back guarantee.
pricingPage.faq.a7: You can purchase additional tokens or wait for them to renew next month.
pricingPage.faq.a8: The 500 tokens are shared among up to 6 members. Each has their own Rowi account.

stories.cta.title: Want to be the next story?
stories.cycle.week1.desc: The Quality Coach observes the classroom with a 3-dimension rubric (emotional openness, connection, transfer). The rubric describes what is observed: it is evidence, not judgment.
stories.cycle.week1.title: Week 1 — Observation
stories.cycle.week2.desc: An individual meeting with each teacher. Together they co-build one or two concrete improvements and agree on an explicit commitment for the coming weeks.
stories.cycle.week2.title: Week 2 — 1:1 Feedback
stories.cycle.week3.desc: A group meeting where learning becomes horizontal: teachers bring real classroom cases, analyze them collectively and leave with next steps.
stories.cycle.week3.title: Week 3 — Community of practice
stories.cycle.week4.desc: The Quality Coach themselves receives technical supervision from Brain Up backed by Six Seconds, closing the program's quality cycle.
stories.cycle.week4.title: Week 4 — Supervision
stories.eb.placeholderDesc: When an organization authorizes sharing its journey, its case will appear here with real, verified data. We do not publish results we cannot back up.
stories.eb.subtitle: The emotional observability system for people, teams and organizations. Each lens sees the same data according to who is looking and what the data subject consented to.
stories.eb.title: Emotional Budgeting
stories.hero.subtitle: We honestly explain what kind of change each Six Seconds framework operated by ROWIIA pursues. No invented metrics: real frameworks, verified cases as the program matures.
stories.hero.title: Real transformations
stories.honesty: Our commitment: we never invent figures or testimonials. What you see here are the frameworks and outcomes the Six Seconds methodology pursues. Verified cases are published only when they exist and with explicit authorization.
stories.schools.badge: EmoPower Schools · Six Seconds + Brain Up Ecuador
stories.schools.evsDesc: Institutional school climate measured across 4 dimensions: emotional safety, connection, belonging and shared purpose. It is aggregated, not individual, and applied in 3 waves during the year to compare progress.
stories.schools.journalDesc: What the student writes is theirs: the school does not see it. Privacy is absolute and differentiating; only configured crisis signals escalate to the support team to protect the student.
stories.schools.placeholderDesc: As institutions complete their year with EmoPower Schools, we will share their verified journeys here, with their authorization.
stories.schools.subtitle: A 12-month SEL program that accompanies entire schools. The operational heart is the monthly Quality Coach cycle, which repeats every month throughout the year.
stories.schools.title: Education systems that learn to feel
stories.useCases.family.desc: Family Vital Signs (FVS) adapts the model to family systems: it measures how it feels to live in this family today, what sustains it and what depletes it, always with mutual consent.
stories.useCases.family.title: Families
stories.useCases.org.desc: Organizational Vital Signs (OVS) connects climate with four business outcomes: future success, customer focus, productivity and retention. ROI is the outcome; ROE is the engine.
stories.useCases.org.title: Organizations
stories.useCases.person.desc: The KCG model (Know · Choose · Give) works the 8 SEI competencies so each person understands what they feel, chooses how to respond and connects with their purpose.
stories.useCases.person.title: People
stories.useCases.team.desc: Team Vital Signs (TVS) measures team climate across the 5 drivers and identifies its archetype (Lantern, Map, First Aid Kit or Hiking Boots) to guide development.
stories.useCases.team.title: Teams

weekflow.checkin.guidance.anger: Anger signals something important. Is there an obstacle or injustice that needs the team's attention?

weekflow.checkin.guidance.fear: It's valid to feel this way. Naming fear is the first step to managing it. Is there something specific you can share to get support?
weekflow.checkin.guidance.positive: Great! Sharing your positive energy can inspire your team. What triggered this emotion?
weekflow.checkin.guidance.sadness: Sadness connects us with what we value. It's okay to not be okay. Do you need something from your team?
weekflow.checkin.guidance.surprise: Surprise invites us to pause and recalibrate. Did something unexpected change your plans this week?
weekflow.checkin.guidance.trust: Trust is the foundation of teamwork. What's strengthening your connection?
